title: Create Aeronautics: burner fuel
description: the Create Aeronautics burner will now require fuel
body:
**This mod adds fuel consumption to the adjustable_burner item from Create Aeronautics.**
any combustible fuel can be used.

![fuel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78016f6b8d29f2ffaed008bfbc8440b9cc877621.png)
